name: peerit-relay
description: Public, untrusted availability relay that bridges normal browsers into peerit's P2P network. Holds no signing keys; every record it serves is re-verified in the browser.

scripts.test: node test/relay-e2e.mjs && node test/relay-hardening.mjs && node test/relay-persist.mjs && node test/relay-discovery.mjs && node test/wire-conformance.mjs

comment: The in-memory core needs no dependencies and powers the e2e test. The production 'hypercore' core needs these installed (npm i corestore hyperbee hyperswarm b4a) — they are not exercised by CI because they require a live DHT.
